name: Social Video Downloader API
description: Extract video download URLs from TikTok, Twitter/X, Instagram, YouTube, and Facebook by parsing public HTML pages. Fast and reliable.
long_description:
A lightweight Social Video Downloader API built on Cloudflare Workers. Extract direct video download URLs and metadata from major social media platforms including TikTok, Twitter/X, Instagram, YouTube, and Facebook. Simply pass a video URL and get back the direct download link. Also supports metadata-only mode to get video info without the download URL. No browser automation or headless browsers required — pure HTML parsing for maximum speed.

💎 FREE tier available! Upgrade to Pro for 50,000 requests/month, higher rate limits, and priority support. Ultra and Mega plans available for enterprise-scale usage.

endpoints.name: Download Video
endpoints.description: Extract video download URL from a social media video page

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Video URL from TikTok, Twitter/X, Instagram, YouTube, or Facebook

endpoints.name: Video Info
endpoints.description: Get video metadata without the download URL

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Video URL from a supported platform

endpoints.name: List Platforms
endpoints.description: List all supported platforms with URL patterns

endpoints.name: API Info
endpoints.description: Get API information and available endpoints
